calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Ross for Glinda Rebecca Marie O'Donnell

The Court requested that Ms. Ross submit an order to withdraw funds from a blocked account. Ms. Ross stated that she agrees that the amount of costs advanced is $2164.48. The Court asked about the title of the pleading. Ms. Ross responded that they had noticed all interested parties with a copy of the pleading, that in regards to the Court Call costs, she is an out of town attorney, that the examiner posts the tentatives late, that she has receipts for everything, that there was a hearing on 1/25/16 and that she does not agree with the examiner's stance on the 11/10/15 & 12/8/15 dates. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Jan-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Ross (via court call) for (petitioner) Glinda O'Donnell.

The Court asked counsel why a petition to increase bond has not been filed. Ms. Ross stated that they were uncertain as to why they needed to increase the bond. The Court stated that it made it clear at the last hearing that all excuses were inappropriate, that the administrator is out of state, that the funds are not in California, that there is 1.2 million dollars in a single bank account and that the administrator is only bonded for $250,000.00. Ms. Ross stated that there was not a discussion at the last hearing regarding all of the beneficiaries waiving bond, that they thought it was a misunderstanding and that they thought the bond was only for creditor purposes. The Court asked why the funds are not in a California bank account and why they are all in one account. Ms. Ross stated that she is not sure, that she will talk to her client regarding moving the funds. The status on filing bond was continued to January 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 at which time there must be an ex parte application to increase bond on file.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Continued To Jan-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Ross, for petitioner Glinda O'Donnell.

Ms. Ross stated that the petition for final distribution had been completed and was in the hands of her client for signature. The Court asked about the amount of the bond, and the amount of money in the estate. Ms. Ross stated that the amount in the estate was now in excess of $1,000,000.00, and that the bond amount was set based on the debts of the estate, not its assets. The Court responded that if there are liquid assets in the estate, the bond must reflect their value. The matter was continued to January 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for status of the filing of a petition for final distribution and status of an ex parte petition to increase the bond amount.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Continued To Dec-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Ross (via court call) for Glinda O'Donnell.

The Court asked about the status of administration and that nothing has been filed to indicate service. Ms. Ross stated that it was mailed a week ago and that she is not sure where it is or why it did not get filed. The Court stated that it is not in a position to proceed on the merits, asked if receipts for the preliminary distribution have been sent in and continued the probate accounting status report to December 8, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Ross stated that they intend to file a petition for final distribution prior to that date and asked if the 12/8/15 date would then go off calendar. The Court stated that it may go off calendar if the petition is filed and properly served but cannot tell at this moment.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
